sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ عَجُوزٌ طَيِّبَةٌ تَعِيشُ وَحِيدَةً فِي بَيْتٍ صَغِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Dobra starica je živjela sama u maloj kući.
sentences.translationEn: A kind old woman lived alone in a small house.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ تَزْرَعُ الْوُرُودَ أَمَامَ بَيْتِهَا كُلَّ رَبِيعٍ.
sentences.translation: Svake proljeće je sadila ruže ispred kuće.
sentences.translationEn: She planted roses in front of her house every spring.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الأَطْفَالُ يَمُرُّونَ أَمَامَ بَيْتِهَا وَيَبْتَسِمُونَ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su prolazila ispred njene kuće i smiješila se.
sentences.translationEn: The children would pass in front of her house and smile.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الزُّهُورُ هَدِيَّتَهَا لِكُلِّ مَنْ يَمُرُّ.
sentences.translation: Cvijeće je bio njen poklon svakome ko prolazi.
sentences.translationEn: The flowers were her gift to all who passed by.
